name: Humdingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and sugar in a skillet, stirring for 2 minutes.
2. Add chopped dates. Set aside.
3. In a small bowl, beat the eggs and milk together.
4. Slowly add a small amount of hot mixture to the eggs and milk.
5. Pour the entire egg mixture into the skillet.
6. Cook the mixture for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
7. Add nuts, vanilla, and cereal.
8. Roll a small amount, about 1 large heaping tablespoon, into a ball (be careful, it will be hot) and roll the ball in coconut.
This freezes well.
